summary: High‑quality audience recording of a second set that shines on Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain and a blistering Eyes of the World.
review: The reviewer praises the sound as “awesome” and noticeably better than other audience tapes, indicating a clean, well‑captured source. Musical highlights cited are a sweet rendition of Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain and a blistering take on Eyes of the World, suggesting a strong second‑set performance despite limited detail on the full show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it rates the recording highly and highlights several standout songs, leading to a solid combined rating but limited data for high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the sound "awesome" and noticeably better than another audience recording, indicating clear, well‑balanced audio with no noted flaws.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Only the second set is present; reviewer notes strong flow for the highlighted songs.
